text.title: Docker Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the docker methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: harden
step.action: Set `USER`, `HEALTHCHECK`, pin base by digest, add `.dockerignore`.

step.name: build-cache
step.action: Enable BuildKit; add cache mounts for dependency manager (pip/npm/apt).

step.name: scan
step.action: Run Artifact Analysis / Trivy; block on CRITICAL.

step.name: push
step.action: Push to Artifact Registry; tag by digest + semver.
